_comment: Autopilot-only permissions, passed via `claude --settings` in hack/codespace-autopilot.sh. Self-contained so it holds whether --settings merges with or replaces .claude/settings.json. The point of this file vs the shared .claude/settings.json is the `gh pr merge` deny: the UNATTENDED autopilot must never merge (or --admin-override) protected main, while a SUPERVISED session may when David says so.
